title: saxifraga moschata var. kotulae
intro: Saxifraga moschata var. kotulae, also known as Kotula's saxifrage, is a plant species in the saxifrage family that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. It is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is rich in mucilage, which can help soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, offering potential health benefits such as improved respiratory and digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used in herbal capsules or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
